# ASS-ADE Cheat Sheet

Auto-generated by ASS-ADE rebuild · `20260422_232614` · 2026-04-22
Regenerated on every rebuild — always current.

---

## CLI Commands

```
Usage: python -m ass_ade [OPTIONS] COMMAND [ARGS]...                          
                                                                               
 Autonomous Sovereign System: Atomadic Development Environment. Public-safe    
 developer shell for local, hybrid, and premium workflows.                     
                                                                               
 Run with no subcommand to start Atomadic — the interactive front door.        
                                                                               
┌─ Options ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ --install-completion          Install completion for the current shell.     │
│ --show-completion             Show completion for the current shell, to     │
│                               copy it or customize the installation.        │
│ --help                        Show this message and exit.                   │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
┌─ Commands ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│ chat                    Start an interactive chat session with Atomadic.    │
│ init                                                                        │
│ doctor                                                                      │
│ credits                 Show your API credit balance and usage, with quick  │
│                         buy links.                                          │
│ plan                                                                        │
│ cycle                                                                       │
│ pay                     Demonstrate x402 autonomous payment flow on Base    │
│                         L2.                                                 │
│ wallet                  Show x402 wallet status and chain configuration.    │
│ search                  Search the private Atomadic RAG knowledge base.     │
│ sam-status              Show SAM TRS scoring status and G23 gate history    │
│                         for the current session.                            │
│ wisdom-report           Show WisdomEngine audit history, conviction trend,  │
│                         and distilled principles.                           │
│ tca-status              Show TCA (Technical Context Acquisition) freshness  │
│                         status for tracked files.                           │
│ eco-scan                Run a monadic compliance check on any codebase.     │
│ recon                   Run parallel codebase reconnaissance — 6 agents, no │
│                         LLM, < 5 s.                                         │
│ rebuild                 Rebuild any codebase into a clean tier-partitioned  │
│                         modular folder.                                     │
│ rebuild-from-blueprint  Reconstruct any artifact from a BLUEPRINT.json +    │
│                         the engine.                                         │
│ rollback                Restore the most recent backup created by a         │
│                         previous rebuild.                                   │
│ enhance                 Proactive enhancement recommendation cycle for any  │
│                         codebase.                                           │
│ docs                    Auto-generate a full documentation suite for any    │
│                         repository.                                         │
│ lint                    Run the monadic linter on any codebase.             │
│ certify                 Generate a tamper-evident certificate for any       │
│                         codebase.                                           │
│ design                  Blueprint engine: turn ideas into AAAA-SPEC-004     │
│                         component blueprints.                               │
│ lora-train              Fine-tune a shared LoRA adapter from the live       │
│                         sample pool and promote it.                         │
│ lora-credit             Show accrued Nexus credit balance (auto-applied on  │
│                         paid calls).                                        │
│ lora-status             Show LoRA flywheel contribution status and adapter  │
│                         health.                                             │
│ setup                   Interactive setup wizard — configure ASS-ADE in     │
│                         under 60 seconds.                                   │
│ tutorial                Interactive 2-minute demo — rebuild, enhance, docs, │
│                         and certify a sample project.                       │
│ train                   Local LoRA training pipeline — bootstrapped from    │
│                         ASS-ADE's own development data.                     │
│ build                   Synthesize a project from a natural-language intent │
│                         (Wave 3 / CNA pipeline).                            │
│ extend                  Additively fill gaps in an existing repository      │
│                         using the CNA registry.                             │
│ reclaim                 Invert a legacy repository into a lean,             │
│                         registry-backed rebuild.                            │
│ nexus                   Discover AAAA-Nexus public contracts and service    │
│                         status.                                             │
│ mcp                     MCP manifest discovery and safe invocation helpers. │
│ repo                    Useful local-only repo inspection helpers.          │
│ protocol                Run a sanitized public-safe enhancement cycle.      │
│ oracle                  Hallucination Oracle, Trust Phase, Entropy, and     │
│                         Trust Decay.                                        │
│ ratchet                 RatchetGate session security — CVE-2025-6514 fix.   │
│ trust                   Trust Oracle (TCM-100/101) — formally bounded agent │
│                         trust.                                              │
│ text                    Text AI — summarize, keywords, sentiment.           │
│ security                Security — threat scoring, shield, PQC signing,     │
│                         zero-day scan.                                      │
│ prompt                  Prompt artifact tools — hash, validate, section,    │
│                         diff, propose.                                      │
│ llm                     AI inference — Llama 3.1 8B via AAAA-Nexus.         │
│ escrow                  Agent Escrow — create, release, status, dispute,    │
│                         arbitrate.                                          │
│ reputation              Reputation Ledger — record, score, history,         │
│                         dispute.                                            │
│ sla                     SLA Engine — register, report, status, breach.      │
│ discovery               Agent Discovery — search, recommend, registry.      │
│ swarm                   Agent Swarm — plan, relay, intent-classify, and     │
│                         more.                                               │
│ compliance              Compliance Products — EU AI Act, fairness, drift,   │
│                         oversight.                                          │
│ defi                    DeFi Suite — optimize, risk-score, oracle-verify,   │
│                         yield.                                              │
│ aegis                   AEGIS — MCP proxy, epistemic route, certify epoch.  │
│ control                 Control Plane — authorize, spending, lineage,       │
│                         federation.                                         │
│ identity                Identity & Auth — verify, sybil-check, delegate,    │
│                         federation.                                         │
│ vrf                     VRF Gaming — draw, verify-draw.                     │
│ bitnet                  BitNet 1.58-bit inference — chat, models,           │
│                         benchmark.                                          │
│ vanguard                VANGUARD — red-team, MEV route, wallet session,     │
│                         escrow.                                             │
│ mev                     MEV Shield — protect transaction bundles, check     │
│                         status.                                             │
│ forge                   Forge Marketplace — leaderboard, verify,            │
│                         quarantine, delta.                                  │
│ dev                     Developer Tools — starter, crypto-toolkit, routing. │
│ data                    Data Tools — validate JSON, format convert.         │
│ context                 Context tools — context packets and local vector    │
│                         memory.                                             │
│ workflow                Hero Workflows — trust-gate, certify, safe-execute. │
│ agent                   Agentic IDE — chat and run tasks using any model.   │
│ a2a                     A2A Interop — agent card validation, negotiation,   │
│                         and discovery.                                      │
│ pipeline                Workflow Pipelines — composable, chainable workflow │
│                         execution.                                          │
│ blueprint               Blueprint → production-grade codebase (no stubs,    │
│                         certificate-backed).                                │
│ finish                  Complete 20–80% codebases: fill stub bodies via     │
│                         refinement loop.                                    │
│ feature                 Propose a blueprint for a new feature. Build it     │
│                         with `ass-ade blueprint build`.                     │
│ selfbuild               Run the monadic rebuild over ASS-ADE itself and its │
│                         sibling !ass-ade* repos.                            │
│ optimize                Atomadic Swarm Optimizer (ASO) — context, swarm,    │
│                         codebase, telemetry lanes.                          │
│ providers               Manage free LLM providers (Groq, Gemini,            │
│                         OpenRouter, Ollama, ...).                           │
│ memory                  Atomadic local memory — what I remember about you   │
│                         and your projects.                                  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```
